'''Caltinia''' was a lush [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[House Elegin/Legends|House Elegin]], famous for its hundreds of [[Gladiator/Legends|dueling]] fields surrounded by numerous mausoleums, [[temple]]s, and [[Museum/Legends|museums]] celebrating and mourning epic duels of the [[Timeline of galactic history/Legends|past]]. It was located in the [[Senex-Juvex/Legends|Senex-Juvex's]] [[Senex sector/Legends|Senex sector]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] and [[Western Reaches/Legends|Western Reaches]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="TEA" /> Caltinia was once visited by [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]].<ref name="marvel83">[[Star Wars (1977) 83|''Star Wars'' (1977) 83]]</ref>
